title: Legacy Dyes
description: 1.21.8 dye textures for players who prefer the older look.
body:
A lightweight resource pack that reverts all dye textures to their pre-1.21.8 versions. Ideal for nostalgia lovers, modpack creators, and anyone who preferred the old color icons. Fully compatible with other GUI/resource packs.

This pack focuses purely on restoring the classic dye visuals while keeping the rest of the game untouched, making it a perfect drop-in addition for any setup. Whether you're building a retro-themed world, assembling a modpack, or simply miss the simplicity of the older textures, this pack brings back that familiar charm without affecting performance.

- No changes to gameplay — visuals only  
- Works with shaders and HD packs  
- Compatible with 1.21.x  
- Zero performance impact  
- Safe for servers and modded environments

If you enjoy clean, simple, and nostalgic vanilla-style visuals, this resource pack is a perfect fit. Let the classic colors return! 🎨
